title: ar3 y0u co1d?
description: this world was not meant for you.
body:
this world was not meant for you. **~~L34V3 N0W~~**

cold, harsh, and unforgiving. **~~Y0U 4R3 N07 W3LC0M3~~**

every step of the way wanting nothing more than to see your downfall. **~~B3F0R3 Y0U D13~~**

how long can you endure? **~~Y0U W1LL N07 5URV1V3~~**

Detailed Description:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

A horror modpack incorporating an overwhelming feeling of not belonging here. You're tossed into a dark, cold world vaguely resembling old minecraft. You can never expect what will happen, what you'll be tossed into, and most importantly, what will come out of the fog. Not even I, the creator of such a thing, truly knows what can happen. You're better off going into this blind, but _check the gallery if you want some insight_.

</details>
